health_conditions: small subscapularis tear in left shoulder

benefits.description: BPC-157 completely healed small subscapularis tear in left shoulder and supraspinatus tear in right shoulder; years of PT had not achieved this result. Could not do a pushup on knees without pain prior.

protocol_notes: Recommends trying BPC before surgery for shoulder tears. Avoided the injurious movement and worked around the injury during treatment.
